website_unreachable.title: Website does not load
website_unreachable.description: Homepage returns 4xx/5xx, DNS failure, or timeout (HEAD/GET).
website_unreachable.remediation: Find current domain on Maps/Instagram; patch website, email, Sources:, and menu URLs.

website_empty.title: Missing website
website_empty.remediation: Add official https URL from venue contact page.

email_domain_mismatch.title: Email domain ≠ website
email_domain_mismatch.description: Contact email hostname does not match website hostname.
email_domain_mismatch.remediation: Use info@ on the same domain as website (e.g. info@kiosk-budapest.hu).

sources_host_mismatch.title: Sources: URLs on wrong host
sources_host_mismatch.description: longDescription Sources: lists a hostname different from website (excluding ticket subdomains).
sources_host_mismatch.remediation: Align all Sources: URLs with the live website domain.

sources_missing.title: Missing Sources: block
sources_missing.description: longDescription has no Sources: https://... audit line.
sources_missing.remediation: Append Sources: with official URLs used for the listing.

stale_domain_in_copy.title: Stale / dead domain in text
stale_domain_in_copy.description: Known retired domain still in website or description (e.g. kioskbudapest.com).
stale_domain_in_copy.remediation: Replace with current official domain everywhere.

legacy_provider_id.title: Retired provider id
legacy_provider_id.description: Row still uses a migrated-away prov-* id.
legacy_provider_id.remediation: Rename via migrate-legacy-venue-provider-ids.cjs or patch to canonical id.

canonical_location_mismatch.title: Wrong borough / neighborhood / address
canonical_location_mismatch.description: Does not match CANONICAL_BY_ID or street-based inference (e.g. Budapest Park in Óbuda).
canonical_location_mismatch.remediation: Patch borough, neighborhood, address from official source; run location fix scripts.

forbidden_district_copy.title: Wrong district in description
forbidden_district_copy.description: Copy mentions Óbuda Island / Újbuda for a Ferencváros or Terézváros venue.
forbidden_district_copy.remediation: Rewrite descriptions; sync events hosted at that venue.

canonical_website_mismatch.title: Wrong official website for venue
canonical_website_mismatch.description: MVM Dome or Budapest Park website is not the canonical .hu domain.
canonical_website_mismatch.remediation: Set venue website to mvm-dome.hu / budapestpark.hu; put promoters on events only.

image_empty.title: Missing image
image_empty.remediation: Upload venue-appropriate photo via ingest/upload; unique ImgBB URL.

image_not_imgbb.title: Image not on ImgBB
image_not_imgbb.remediation: Download official asset, upload, store returned ImgBB URL.

banned_imgbb_hash.title: Banned ImgBB hash
banned_imgbb_hash.description: Reuses a known-bad filename from bulk mistakes (concert art, park generic, etc.).
banned_imgbb_hash.remediation: Replace with venue-specific upload; never reuse cde3b78d5c56, cb56a463140e, …

duplicate_provider_image.title: Duplicate provider image
duplicate_provider_image.description: Same ImgBB URL on multiple providers.
duplicate_provider_image.remediation: One unique upload per provider row.

duplicate_meetup_cover.title: Duplicate culture circle cover
duplicate_meetup_cover.description: Same coverImageUrl on multiple meetup groups.

duplicate_event_image.title: Duplicate event poster
duplicate_event_image.description: Same image on multiple timed events.
duplicate_event_image.remediation: Per-show poster from ticket page; unique ImgBB per event.

image_shared_across_catalog.title: Same image on provider + event or meetup
image_shared_across_catalog.description: Concert poster on venue row, or one URL reused across listing types.
image_shared_across_catalog.remediation: Venue = interior/exterior; event = show art; meetup = district scene — all unique URLs.

event_image_same_as_venue.title: Event poster = venue card image
event_image_same_as_venue.description: Timed event image URL equals host provider image.
event_image_same_as_venue.remediation: Scrape per-show art from ticket URL for event.image only.

meetup_cover_same_as_event.title: Meetup cover = event poster
meetup_cover_same_as_event.description: Culture circle cover matches a timed event image.
meetup_cover_same_as_event.remediation: Upload dedicated coverImageUrl per meetup group.

meetup_cover_same_as_venue.title: Meetup cover = venue image
meetup_cover_same_as_venue.description: Culture circle cover matches a provider listing image.
meetup_cover_same_as_venue.remediation: Use district/community scene, not a restaurant card photo.

image_source_off_venue_site.description: imageSource host differs from website (may be OK for Webflow/Wikimedia).
image_source_off_venue_site.title: imageSource off-domain
image_source_off_venue_site.remediation: Prefer hero from venue site; Webflow CDN and Commons are acceptable.

unrelated_image_source.title: imageSource from unrelated site
unrelated_image_source.description: imageSource hostname is not website, Webflow CDN, Wikimedia, or ImgBB.
unrelated_image_source.remediation: Re-scrape from official venue site; avoid random blogs/stock.

possible_wrong_cuisine_copy.title: Cuisine copy mismatch
possible_wrong_cuisine_copy.description: Mediterranean label on clearly Hungarian venue copy.
possible_wrong_cuisine_copy.remediation: Match cuisine to official positioning (e.g. modern Hungarian bistro).

missing_menu.title: No menu sections
missing_menu.description: Restaurant/Café/Party venue without menu.sections for Eat & Drink.
missing_menu.remediation: Patch menu from official /eteleink, /italaink, or menu board images.

menu_tags_without_body.title: menuTags without items
menu_tags_without_body.description: Computed menuTags present but no menu sections (orphan tags).
menu_tags_without_body.remediation: Add full menu patch or clear stale tags via re-ingest.

event_legacy_venue_id.title: Event links retired venue id
event_legacy_venue_id.description: venueIds references prov-* alias that was migrated.
event_legacy_venue_id.remediation: Update venueIds to canonical id in same payload as provider rename.

event_host_location_mismatch.title: Event district ≠ host venue
event_host_location_mismatch.description: Event borough/neighborhood does not match canonical host location.
event_host_location_mismatch.remediation: Set event borough/neighborhood from primary host; fix host provider first.

event_host_catalog_location_wrong.title: Host venue still has wrong district in catalog
event_host_catalog_location_wrong.description: Live host provider fails canonical location rules.
event_host_catalog_location_wrong.remediation: Patch host provider before ingesting or patching events.

suspicious_free_tickets.title: Paid show marked FREE
suspicious_free_tickets.description: Event has booking URL or paid-sounding title but entryFees use FREE with amount 0.
suspicious_free_tickets.remediation: Use HUF/EUR tiers from ticket page or empty entryFees + missingOrUncertain.

flagged.name: Ferenc Római Catholic Parish Cultural Events
